items.title: A2UI v0.9 Message
items.description: A JSON message conforming to the A2UI v0.9 protocol. Each message MUST contain exactly ONE of: 'createSurface', 'updateComponents', 'updateDataModel', or 'deleteSurface'.

createSurface.description: Initializes a new UI surface and begins rendering.

surfaceId.description: Unique identifier for the surface. Must be new and unused if adding a new surface.

catalogId.description: URI identifying the component catalog to use for this surface.

theme.description: Optional theme parameters as defined by the catalog's theme schema.

sendDataModel.description: When true, the client includes the full data model in metadata with every server-bound message.

updateComponents.description: Adds or updates UI components on a surface. Exactly one component must have id 'root'.

components.description: Flat list of components. Each entry has an 'id', a 'component' type string, and type-specific properties at the same level.

id.description: Unique component identifier within the surface.

updateDataModel.description: Updates the data model for a surface at a given JSON Pointer path. Plain JSON values — no type wrappers.

surfaceId.description: The surface whose data model is updated.

path.description: JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) specifying where to set the value. Defaults to '/' (root) if omitted.

value.description: New value at the specified path. Any JSON value is accepted. Omitting removes the key.

deleteSurface.description: Removes a surface and all associated components from the UI.
